opportunities.title: Single Point of Access (SPoA) Eye Care Service
opportunities.buyer: NHS Cheshire and Merseyside Integrated Care Board
opportunities.summary: NHS Cheshire and Merseyside Integrated Care Board is procuring a Single Point of Access (SPoA) Eye Care Service to provide a clinically led referral management and triage service for ophthalmology referrals across Cheshire and Merseyside. The service will improve referral quality…

opportunities.title: Strategic Culture Change Partner
opportunities.buyer: University Hospitals Sussex NHS Foundation Trust
opportunities.summary: The Trust is looking at appointing an Organisational Culture Change Strategic Partner to provide specialist capacity and expertise to design, deliver and embed a Trust‑wide cultural transformation programme.

opportunities.title: Provision of Workforce and Associated Services
opportunities.buyer: North Cumbria Integrated Care NHS Foundation Trust
opportunities.summary: North Cumbria Integrated Care NHS Foundation Trust is seeking to appoint a Neutral Vendor to provide a fully managed service for the supply of Temporary Clinical Workforce across its sites. The appointed Neutral Vendor will be responsible for the sourcing, and fulfilment of tempo…
